header.title: Graphical Usage Guide
header.description: This guide is generated from current project state so labels and views stay up to date.

steps.title: Selection Controls
steps.text: Compare controls one-panel or two-panel selection. Swap flashes and swaps the language order.

steps.title: Language Targeting
steps.text: Moving language replaces the targeted side. Highlight shifts to the new selected pair.

steps.title: Choose View Set
steps.text: Switch between ATLAS VIEWS and LEARNING VIEWS, then read the active view keywords below.
